reviews.review_description: Great game. I have found this game surprisingly enjoyable. Would love to see some kind of progression/management feature added, even if that just means taking credits for each person that rides one of the attractions.

Everything is in the menu from the grip button. Let people on to the rides, ride speed, camera (including on ride camera) but it feels like the default version is the advanced controls and they have no text. Each ride is a standalone area. Movement is jerky and unejoyable. I feel like they're close.

In this game you need to figure out the controls, and I took it as part of the fun ( like an escape room games for example)

You can actually be seated (in a particular ride of your choice ) in first person view, however you can also control the the queue of people and their entry and exit and I suppose later on the game will reward you for smooth operation of the ride .

This reminds me of rollercoaster Dreams on psvr1 and I loved it!

It would be great if the player could actually place the rides and also design and build rollercoasters and theme parks

I'm currently enjoying Coaster Mania ( also on app Lab ) The developer's should get together on this one lol!

The rides are graphically beautiful with attention to detail including realistic creaking noises made by the structure and lightning effects etc.

This is a Great start to a game that has a lot of potential in the future!
Five stars from me.
⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐

I have been trying to find a good theme park ride simulator like no limits 2. While it needs work in areas it is awesome.  You do have to try to figure how to use but you can control a lot neat options like day or night and ride speed. Pay no attention to negative reviews because they need to just spend time with it more. Anyway I would love more rollercoasters and rides.  So glad I purchased this!

I was nerding out on Roller Coaster Dreams on my PSVR back in 2018, and I've been waiting for a Oculus equivalent. I'm so happy to see this. I'd like to see the swings that go in a circle on chains as a ride. I appreciate this application, and the work that's went into the theme park. 

Note to developer: play Rollercoaster Dreams, it can be played in 2D, or VR.

reviews.review_title: I know how to move the rides
reviews.review_description:
Hold grip then press settings press person with a seat and press load then once they load press settings button in settings then hold 
load

Gonna second someone else’s review. 

I don’t understand how to ‘play’ this. There is no instruction manual and the symbols don’t make any sense. I just aimlessly let people on and off rides and walk around etc. what makes the rides start? How do I actually ride one? 

If I am doing something wrong I will happily change my review but feels like we were just thrown to the wolves on this one. I mean it *looks* cool.

All I can do Is walk around (and under and through and over) things.  I can’t get “on” any of the rides and none of them actually do anything.  I just sit there and watch people walk around and a ride operator pushing a button once in awhile.  I’m not bothered by the unpolished mechanics but I am bothered by the menu screen with nonsensical symbols and that this doesn’t actually seem to be a game nor a simulator, unless waiting for rides to start is the sim.

DEVS:  if I am doing something wrong, please tell me, I hate leaving bad reviews and would love to hove a good one!

I figured out how to control the ferris wheel ride it let people on and off but I go to change the ride and non of them are light up and available I pd for the game so why can't I go to a different ride.
Very fun. Could add some more rides.

Do not purchase this title.  The description reads as though you’ll have the full game to explore.  you dont!. only rhe ferris wheel is available.  I feel conned out of  £5.99.  obviously no rufund button either.
